MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_HIRO_MAGIC_REVIVE_POW: Upon death, revive and heal {ReviveHeal} HP, then lose 1 stack.
Upon death, revive and heal [blue]{ReviveHeal}[/blue] HP, then lose 1 stack.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_EMA_WITCH_FACTOR_POWE: When HP drops below {Amount}, die instantly.
When HP drops below [blue]{Amount}[/blue], die instantly.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_EMA_WITCH_KILLER_POWE: At the start of each turn, all enemies gain 10 Ema Witch Factor, all allies gain 1. When enemies take damage, gain equal stacks. When allies take damage, gain stacks equal to a quarter of the damage.
Turn start: enemies +10, allies +1 Ema Witch Factor. Enemy damage: +equal. Ally damage: +quarter.
